scripts.ci:bootstrap: PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1 python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt pytest pytest-asyncio ruff
scripts.ci:build: npm run ci:bootstrap && python3 -m compileall src
scripts.ci:lint: npm run ci:bootstrap && python3 -m ruff check src tests
scripts.ci:test: npm run ci:bootstrap && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest
